history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a “LEVEL UP!” game-style interface with a profile panel displaying a user name and progress statistics.

Main Subject:
A rectangular, dark interface panel centered on the screen contains the title “LEVEL UP!” at the top and a profile card with a circular avatar image on the left, plus multiple level and experience counters and smaller metric boxes underneath.

Setting:
The scene is entirely digital with a dark purple and navy color palette, lit by subtle gradients and glowing accents, and no real-world background is visible.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in bold yellow with decorative diamond-like symbols on either side. Beneath it, a large rounded rectangle panel spans most of the width. Inside the panel, the name “Kayzzzz” appears in large white text, with a small gold badge to the right showing “#1”. Under the name, the label “LEVEL PROGRESS” is shown in smaller light text. On the left side, there is a circular avatar containing stylized, colorful text and an illustration-like background; the circle has a purple outer ring. In the center area, there is a purple rounded box labeled “LEVEL” with a large number “5” beneath it. To the right, a teal rounded box labeled “EXPERIENCE” shows “0 / 300” in large white text. Below these, there is a long, dark horizontal bar with a lighter track and a small “0%” indicator to the right. Near the bottom, three smaller rounded boxes are aligned horizontally: one labeled “MESSAGES” with “282”, one labeled “XP NEEDED” with “300”, and one labeled “NEXT LVL” with “6”. The overall layout is symmetrical, with consistent spacing and soft glow effects around key elements.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayzzzz
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
5
EXPERIENCE
0 / 300
MESSAGES
282
XP NEEDED
300
NEXT LVL
6
0%
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image is a digital level-up dashboard showing a user’s current level and experience progress. It includes counters for level, experience, messages, and XP needed for the next level.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
